CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:OrbitalCalendarState.kt$@Composable internal fun rememberOrbitalCalendarData( displayMonth: Int, displayYear: Int, events: List<Event>, anniversaries: List<Anniversary>, // N-3 修复：todayDateKey 让 todayCal 跨日时失效重建，避免 P-5 remember 缓存导致的 staleness // 调用方传入 "yyyy-MM-dd" 字符串（来自 HomeScreen.dateStr 60s 轮询），跨日时自动刷新 todayDateKey: String ): OrbitalCalendarData

FunctionNaming:HomeChannelList.kt$@Composable internal fun ChannelIcon( channel: ChannelDef, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, diameter: Dp = 42.dp, withShimmer: Boolean = false, breathAlpha: Float = 1f, shimmerPhase: Float = 0f )

FunctionNaming:HomeOrbitalCalendar.kt$@Composable internal fun OrbitalCalendar( anniversaries: List<Anniversary>, events: List<Event>, // N-3 修复：todayDateKey 透传到 rememberOrbitalCalendarData，让 todayCal 跨日时失效重建 todayDateKey: String, // Q-9 修复：合并 canvasModifier 和 modifier 为单一 modifier，消除两个 Modifier 参数的语义混淆 modifier: Modifier = Modifier )
FunctionNaming:HomeScreen.kt$@Composable fun HomeScreen( navController: NavController, isTabletLayout: Boolean = false, viewModel: HomeViewModel = hiltViewModel() )

FunctionNaming:HomeScreen.kt$@Composable private fun HomeLoadingSkeleton()

FunctionNaming:HomeScreen.kt$@Composable private fun HomeTopBar( showSettings: Boolean = true, // N-7 + U-10 修复：平板模式传 false 不显示秒级时间，交给 JournalDateBanner 统一呈现日级时间 showTime: Boolean = true, // N-4 修复：isResumed 通过 lambda 传入，让 pausableDelay 每秒读取最新 State.value isResumedProvider: () -> Boolean = { true }, onSettingsClick: () -> Unit )

MaxLineLength:HomeOrbitalCalendar.kt$fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace
MaxLineLength:HomeSignalCard.kt$Text("信号接收中", fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = SignalGreen, letterSpacing = 1.sp)
MaxLineLength:HomeSignalCard.kt$Text(dateStr, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.visible))
MaxLineLength:HomeSignalCard.kt$Text(label, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 8.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f), letterSpacing = 0.5.sp)
MaxLineLength:HomeSignalCard.kt$Text(value.toString(), fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 14.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface)
MaxLineLength:HomeSignalCard.kt$drawLine(color = SignalElectric.copy(alpha = 0.15f), start = Offset(0f, centerH), end = Offset(size.width, centerH), strokeWidth = 0.5f)
MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$drawArc
MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$drawCircle(color = SignalElectric.copy(alpha = breathAlpha), radius = outerR2, center = center, style = Stroke(width = 2f, pathEffect = dashPathEffect))
MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$drawCircle(color = SignalGreen.copy(alpha = rippleAlpha), radius = rippleR - mainR + 10f, center = Offset(todayX, todayY), style = Stroke(width = 1.5f))

MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$val baguaStyle = remember { TextStyle(fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 7.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = SignalPurple.copy(alpha = 0.6f)) }
MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$val centerDayStyle = remember { TextStyle(fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 18.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = SignalElectric) }
MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarCanvas.kt$val dayTodayStyle = remember { TextStyle(fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 9.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Color.White) }

MaxLineLength:OrbitalCalendarInfo.kt$Text("古历", fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 7.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f))
